title: Pakdam Pakdai
desc: There is a constant war between Doggy Don and the three clever mice who live in his house. However, with the help of Doggy Don's brother, an ex-army dog, they fight the mice to win back their house.

desc: Mysterious boxes and their contents cause chaos for jungle creatures.

title: PINAKI & HAPPY IN FLAMES KI HERA-PHERI
desc: Darrnayak's magical flame suddenly goes missing. However, Happy and Pinaki strive to find it and prove Colonel Suri's innocence.
